channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump turns to outsider to shake up Navy, but his lack of military experience raises concerns
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump’s nominee to be secretary of the Navy, John Phelan, has not served in the military or had a civilian leadership role in the service.
item.dc:creator: Tara Copp, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump selects longtime adviser Keith Kellogg as special envoy for Ukraine and Russia
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump said Wednesday that he has chosen Keith Kellogg, a highly decorated retired three-star general, to serve as his special envoy for Ukraine and Russia.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA BALDOR and FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Meet the medical contrarians picked to lead health agencies under Trump and Kennedy
item.description: Donald Trump's health team picks includes outspoken critics of the medical establishment and COVID-19 health measures.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: University of Austin weeds out DEI, replaces it with merit-based initiatives: VP
item.description: The University of Austin, focusing on free speech and debate, replaces DEI with merit-based values, aiming to counter modern campus culture issues.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utah senator coaches GOP aides on strategy for streamlining Trump’s agenda through Congress
item.description: Sen. Mike Lee and the GOP steering committee are holding trainings for GOP staff ahead of budget reconciliation so that they can quickly move President-elect Donald Trump's policies through.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Democrats in Pennsylvania had a horrible 2024 election. They say it's still a swing state
item.description: HARRISBURG, Pa. (AP) — The drubbing Democrats took in Pennsylvania in this year's election has prompted predictable vows to rebound, but it has also sowed doubts about whether Pennsylvania might be leaving the ranks of up-for-grabs swing states for a right-leaning existence more like Ohio's.
item.dc:creator: MARC LEVY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump turns to critic of COVID mandates to run NIH
item.description: Dr. Jay Bhattacharya, a Stanford health researcher, is in line to lead the National Institutes of Health. Early in the pandemic he argued against lockdowns and focusing on people at highest risk.
item.dc:creator: Rob Stein, MPR News

item.title: Trump signs MOU with Biden White House for next phase of transition
item.description: After a lengthy delay, President-elect Trump has signed off on a memorandum of understanding (MOU) with the White House, which will allow officials to meet with counterparts at departments and agencies ahead of the January transition of power.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Donald Trump Jr., Elon Musk joke about purchasing MSNBC
item.description: Musk’s exchange with Trump Jr. is similar to one he had with a Twitter user in 2017 after he was encouraged to purchase the social media platform.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Trump expected to name investor Scott Bessent as Treasury secretary pick
item.description: Bessent, founder and CEO of hedge fund Key Square Group, served as an economic adviser to the Trump campaign, often appearing on financial talk shows to argue in favor of the president-elect's economic policies.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Florida officials allege 'pervasive' discrimination against Trump supporters at FEMA
item.description: Florida Attorney General Ashley Moody and U.S. Rep. Vern Buchanan will hold a news conference Friday "to discuss their efforts to uncover evidence of political discrimination at FEMA and demand accountability," according to a release from Buchanan's office.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: House passes bill that would allow Treasury to target nonprofits it deems to support terrorism
item.description: The U.S. House passed legislation that would give the Treasury Department unilateral authority to strip the tax-exempt status of nonprofits it claims support terrorism.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News
